generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.com/DTDFVocab
prefix base: http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#
instance CalibratedModelParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated parameters such as C_heater, G_box derived from model fitting to experimental data"
]
instance PredictedTemperatureTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasted temperature changes over time based on model simulations"
]
instance SafetyViolationAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alerts for temperature exceeding safe operational limits"
]
instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Graphical representation of temperature data and model predictions for user interpretation"
]
instance DataAvailableInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Confirmation of real-time data availability for digital twin processing"
]
instance AdjustHeatbedDutyCycleAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of heatbed power duty cycle based on temperature feedback",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance AdjustFanSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of fan speed for air circulation control",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance ParameterCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibrates thermal model parameters using experimental data from DS18S20 sensors",
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibratedModelParametersInsight
]
instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates predicted temperature trajectories using calibrated thermal models",
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictedTemperatureTrajectoryInsight
]
instance SafetyMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitors temperature deviations and triggers safety alerts for potential hazards",
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationAlertInsight
]
instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Implements bang-bang control logic for regulating heatbed and fan operations",
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustHeatbedDutyCycleAction, AdjustFanSpeedAction
]
instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualizes sensor data and model predictions for operational insights",
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]
instance DataTransmissionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Transmits sensor data via RabbitMQ and 1-Wire protocols for digital twin processing",
    DTDFVocab:provides DataAvailableInsight
]
instance ScipyCalibrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy non-linear least squares solver for calibrating thermal model parameters",
    DTDFVocab:enables ParameterCalibrationService
]
instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation engine for thermal model execution and prediction",
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, SafetyMonitoringService
]
instance RabbitMQEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for communication between Raspberry Pi and digital twin components",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTransmissionService
]
instance RaspberryPiControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller handling GPIO signals and actuator control",
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlService
]
instance OneWireEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "1-Wire bus protocol implementation for DS18S20 sensor communication",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTransmissionService
]
instance ElectricalIsolationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MOSFETs and optocouplers for electrical isolation in control circuitry",
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlService
]
instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization tools for sensor data and model predictions",
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]
instance ThermalModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with 2 parameters: C_air and G_box, assumes uniform heat distribution and no heatbed heat retention",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]
instance ThermalModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with 4 parameters: C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box, accounts for heatbed thermal inertia",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]
instance ExternalRoomTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 temperature sensor measuring external room temperature with range -55°C to +125°C and ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C to +85°C"
]
instance HeatbedTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 temperature sensor measuring heatbed temperature with range -55°C to +125°C and ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C to +85°C"
]
instance AirTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 temperature sensor measuring internal air temperature in the incubator box with range -55°C to +125°C and ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C to +85°C"
]
instance ExternalRoomTempDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ExternalRoomTemperatureSensor
]
instance HeatbedTempDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HeatbedTemperatureSensor
]
instance AirTempDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AirTemperatureSensor
]
instance ExternalRoomTempData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time external room temperature data from DS18S20 sensor",
    DTDFVocab:fromData ExternalRoomTempDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationEnabler, SimulationEnabler
]
instance HeatbedTempData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time heatbed temperature data from DS18S20 sensor",
    DTDFVocab:fromData HeatbedTempDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationEnabler, SimulationEnabler
]
instance AirTempData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time internal air temperature data from DS18S20 sensor",
    DTDFVocab:fromData AirTempDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationEnabler, SimulationEnabler
]
instance StyrofoamContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03 m³ air volume"
]
instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Heatbed with dimensions 214×214×3 mm"
]
instance Fan : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Fan with airflow rate 0.02 m³/s"
]
instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller"
]
instance CustomPCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Custom PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for electrical isolation"
]
instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for the thermal incubator system"
]
instance MOSFETs : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "MOSFETs handling high current (4A) for heatbed control"
]
instance Optocouplers : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Optocouplers decoupling control signals from driving currents for electrical safety"
]
instance HeatbedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed component for heating, controlled via MOSFETs handling 4A current"
]
instance FanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan for air circulation, controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers"
]
instance ThermalIncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains StyrofoamContainer, Heatbed, Fan, ExternalRoomTemperatureSensor, HeatbedTemperatureSensor, AirTemperatureSensor, RaspberryPiController, CustomPCB, PowerSupply, MOSFETs, Optocouplers, HeatbedActuator, FanActuator
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The controller processes data from RabbitMQ and issues actuation commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed control) to the low-level driver via RabbitMQ. Commands are transmitted as messages to control the heatbed and fan through the PCB's MOSFETs and optocouplers, adhering to predefined safety protocols."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT system comprises a Raspberry Pi-hosted RabbitMQ server, a low-level driver for hardware interaction, a controller implementing bang-bang logic, and simulation models (Model A/B). Physical and virtual components communicate via RabbitMQ, with sensors feeding data to the DT and the DT issuing actuation commands to the heatbed/fan through the driver."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates in the 'as operated' phase of the physical twin's lifecycle, integrating models and data post-deployment to monitor, predict, and optimize the operational behavior of the thermal incubator system."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity was validated by testing Assumption 1 (uniform temperature) using three sensors; maximum discrepancies of 7°C (12V fan) and 6°C (18V fan) were observed. Model B showed better accuracy in predicting thermal inertia due to accounting for heatbed heat retention. Calibration minimized residual error using Scipy's optimization, with parameter estimates validated against experimental trajectories."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ (AMQP protocol) serves as the communication backbone. The Raspberry Pi hosts RabbitMQ, with the low-level driver and controller publishing/subscribing to message queues for sensor data and actuation commands. All communication occurs within the local network of the Raspberry Pi."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The digital twin components (RabbitMQ server, controller, low-level driver, and simulation models) are deployed on a single Raspberry Pi 4 Model B. The system runs entirely on-premises with no cloud dependencies."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The low-level driver implements a safe protocol to prevent unsafe states (e.g., overheating). MOSFETs and optocouplers isolate control signals from high-current circuits, ensuring electrical safety. The bang-bang controller uses defined upper/lower temperature limits (UL/LL) to enforce operational boundaries, though cybersecurity measures are not explicitly detailed."
]
